summary: 3 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Making Marie Antoinette
film.announcement: MUBI acquired worldwide rights to Eleanor Coppola's documentary.

film.title: Finding Mojo
film.announcement: Malaysia-U.K. rom-com unveiled release dates with Double Vision outlining global distribution ambitions.

film.title: Super Size Me (Fried Chicken Documentary)
film.announcement: Netflix is developing a documentary series in the style of Super Size Me focused on fried chicken.

tv.title: The Wall (Italian Version)
tv.announcement: Mediaset ordered a new Italian adaptation of The Wall game show hosted by Max Giusti.

tv.title: Elle
tv.announcement: Showrunners unpacked the Season 1 love triangle cliffhanger and teased plans for Season 2.
